CHAD SAUNDERS, ESQ., CROSNER LEGAL, PC (866) 276-7637 chad@crosnerlegal.com Attorneys for Plaintiff DAMIEN MCNORTON on behalf of the State of California, and others similarly situated and aggrieved
Barbara James CSR 7009, 310-502-1616 blscsr@aol.com Court reporter
No other appearances

Matter was not properly contested by counsel.

Not Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ONTRAC LOGISTICS, INC. Defendant'S Motion To Stay Proceedings Pending Appeal.

Defendant's "motion to stay proceeding pending appeal" is granted. Both parties recognize this court's discretion to stay an action when, as here, a motion to compel arbitration is denied and an appeal follows. (Memo. 15:6-10, citing Freiberg v. City of Mission Viejo (1995) 33 Cal.App.4th 1484, 1489; Opp. 1:15.) Should the court of appeal reverse this court's order, party and judicial resources would be wasted absent a stay.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Barbara James CSR 7009, 310-502-1616 blscsr@aol.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
